title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
